title: Oversee meat processing establishment's Halal compliance
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Oversee meat processing establishment's Halal compliance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify Halal requirements

pcs.text: Research the Australian and specific market Halal requirements for a meat processing establishment to gain or maintain Halal approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research the Australian and specific market Halal requirements for a meat processing establishment to gain or maintain Halal approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research the Australian and specific market Halal requirements for a meat processing establishment to gain or maintain Halal approval.

pcs.text: Identify the establishment's markets, and the specific customer requirements for Halal processing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the establishment's markets, and the specific customer requirements for Halal processing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the establishment's markets, and the specific customer requirements for Halal processing.

pcs.text: Identify and document the requirements applicable to the meat processing establishment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document the requirements applicable to the meat processing establishment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document the requirements applicable to the meat processing establishment.

pcs.text: Communicate the Halal requirements to relevant Muslim and non-Muslim staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate the Halal requirements to relevant Muslim and non-Muslim staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate the Halal requirements to relevant Muslim and non-Muslim staff.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify Halal requirements

elements.title: Assess establishment's compliance with Halal requirements

pcs.text: Review current internal processes relevant to Halal processing, and assess compliance with identified requirements and the Approved Arrangement for initial approval or for retaining approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review current internal processes relevant to Halal processing, and assess compliance with identified requirements and the Approved Arrangement for initial approval or for retaining approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review current internal processes relevant to Halal processing, and assess compliance with identified requirements and the Approved Arrangement for initial approval or for retaining approval.

pcs.text: Develop and implement process for addressing identified gaps in compliance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop and implement process for addressing identified gaps in compliance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and implement process for addressing identified gaps in compliance.

pcs.text: Assess and implement staff training requirements where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and implement staff training requirements where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and implement staff training requirements where required.

pcs.text: Test establishment's compliance with documented processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test establishment's compliance with documented processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test establishment's compliance with documented processes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Assess establishment's compliance with Halal requirements

elements.title: Maintain establishment's Halal compliance

pcs.text: Develop systems for identifying changes to Halal processes that may impact the establishment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop systems for identifying changes to Halal processes that may impact the establishment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop systems for identifying changes to Halal processes that may impact the establishment.

pcs.text: Establish and implement processes for the timely review of documented processes against Halal requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish and implement processes for the timely review of documented processes against Halal requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish and implement processes for the timely review of documented processes against Halal requirements.

pcs.text: Incorporate the review and update process for Halal processing into the establishment's Quality Assurance program (Approved Arrangement)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Incorporate the review and update process for Halal processing into the establishment's Quality Assurance program (Approved Arrangement)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Incorporate the review and update process for Halal processing into the establishment's Quality Assurance program (Approved Arrangement).

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Maintain establishment's Halal compliance
